Hearing On Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jeffrey Wehr, Esq. appeared with petitioner Mindelyn R. Buford, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors Robert Felep Barnett and Felease McLane, Jr., who was also present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendants.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved in the same amount for each minor.

Settlement Amount - $32,776.18.
Attorney's Fees - $7,645.28.
Costs - $2,195.11.

A net balance of $22,935.79 for each minor shall be deposited into blocked accounts with The Mechanics Bank, 4100 MacDonald Avneue, Richmond, CA 94808. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
